auth.loginSubtitleOAuth: Choose your login method and enter your password.
auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your email or phone and password to continue.
auth.publicSubtitle: Your vehicle service universe — explore service centers before signing in.
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.googleNoCode: Google login failed: No authorization code received.
auth.googleNoToken: Google login failed: No ID token received.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSent: We've sent a reset link if an account exists for that email.
auth.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new password reset email.
auth.fillBothPasswords: Please fill in both password fields.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.resetSignInFailed: Password was reset but sign-in failed. Please log in manually.
auth.phoneLoginHelper: Use the phone number linked to your account.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Choose client or service center, then add your sign-in details.

dashboard.heroSubtitle: Your vehicles, service history, and repairs — in one control center.

recommendedActions.title: Recommended Actions
recommendedActions.subtitle: Maintenance and updates that need your attention.

health.noVehiclesBody: Add a vehicle to see health status, maintenance gaps, and service recommendations.

partnerDashboard.heroSubtitle: Open repair requests, send offers, manage bookings, and keep your public service center page up to date.
partnerDashboard.openRequestsEmptySubtitle: New customer repair requests are waiting for your offer.
partnerDashboard.operationsSubtitle: Daily partner workflows — requests, offers, schedule and your public presence.
partnerDashboard.serviceCenterProfileSubtitle: Name, location, services, hours and contact
partnerDashboard.publicPagePreviewSubtitle: How clients see your service center on the map and in search
partnerDashboard.comingSoonSubtitle: Future partner modules — not active yet

createOffer.pageIntro: Send a service proposal to the client.
createOffer.draftSourceOffer: Your last offer for this service
createOffer.pricingHelper: From/exact is required. To is optional for a range. Total is saved separately from the from sum.
createOffer.quotedTotalHelper: From sum and to sum are saved on the offer. Quoted total is what the client books against.
createOffer.availabilityHelper: Tell the client when to bring the vehicle and when it may be ready. Day chips show bookings and times already taken from your calendar.
createOffer.availabilityNotePlaceholder: Any extra detail for the client
createOffer.updateLaterHint: You can update the offer later.
createOffer.estimatedPartsHelper: Add parts if you already know what may be needed. Final parts can be updated during repair.
createOffer.bringTimeRequiredBody: Set bring vehicle date and time first.
createOffer.pickupAfterBringBody: Pickup/ready time must be after bring time.
createOffer.missingRepairIdBody: Repair ID is missing. Please reopen this offer from repair details.
createOffer.laborToMin: Labor To must be at least Labor from/exact.
createOffer.partsToMin: Parts To must be at least Parts from/exact.

activation.title: Activate your Veversal partner account
activation.openRequestsBodyOne: You have 1 open customer request waiting for offers.
activation.openRequestsBodyMany: You have {count} open customer requests waiting for offers.
activation.waitingBody: New customer repair requests are waiting for your offer.
activation.hint: Send offers, manage bookings and build your online service history from one place.
activation.requiredBody: Activate your Veversal partner account to send offers to customers.

emptyRequests.title: No open requests from customers yet
emptyRequests.body: Your Veversal public page helps customers find your service center in every supported language. Complete your profile, publish services and opening hours to start receiving requests.

profileSetup.title: Finish setting up your service center to go live and receive repair requests

comingSoonDialog.title: Coming soon
comingSoonDialog.documentsBody: Central document import is on the Veversal partner roadmap.
comingSoonDialog.inventoryBody: Inventory management is planned for a future release.
comingSoonDialog.reportsBody: Reports are planned for a future release. Snapshot today: {open} open · {active} active · {pending} pending offers.
comingSoonDialog.customersBody: Customer and vehicle CRM tools are planned for a future partner release.
comingSoonDialog.marketIntelligenceBody: Compare your prices with city averages and understand what services customers are requesting most.

documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Invoices, repair docs and warranty evidence in one place

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Parts, warehouse stock and receiving workflows

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Revenue, throughput and customer growth snapshots

marketIntelligence.title: Market Intelligence
marketIntelligence.subtitle: Compare your prices with city averages and understand what services customers are requesting most.

guide.completedBody: This repair is finished and recorded in service history.
guide.inProgressBody: Track parts, notes, and finalize when work is complete.
guide.confirmedBody: Mark vehicle arrived when it arrives at your center.
guide.offerSentBody: Waiting for the customer to review and book your offer.
guide.reviewBody: Review the customer request, photos, and details before sending an offer.

repairsList.selectInvoiceHint: Tap repairs for the same client, then create one combined invoice.
repairsList.emptyFiltered: Try another plate (Latin or Cyrillic), client, or vehicle filter.
repairsList.emptyDefault: When repairs match this status, they'll show up here.

notifications.markAllError: Could not mark all as read
notifications.emptySubtitle: Offers, promotions, bookings, and reschedule updates appear here.

new_repair_request.title: New repair request
new_repair_request.body: A customer sent a new repair request to your service center.

appointment_request.title: Appointment request
appointment_request.body: A customer requested an appointment at your service center.

repair_scheduled.title: Appointment scheduled
repair_scheduled.body: A repair visit has been scheduled on your calendar.

reschedule_proposed.title: Reschedule proposed
reschedule_proposed.body: A new appointment time was proposed.

reschedule_counter_proposed.title: Counter-proposal received
reschedule_counter_proposed.body: Review the proposed appointment time on your calendar.

reschedule_accepted.title: Schedule confirmed
reschedule_accepted.body: The client confirmed the new appointment time.

reschedule_declined.title: Reschedule declined
reschedule_declined.body: The appointment time change was declined.

offer_booking_cancelled.title: Booking cancelled
offer_booking_cancelled.body: A customer cancelled a booked offer.

vehicle_arrived.title: Vehicle arrived
vehicle_arrived.body: The customer's vehicle has arrived at your center.

client_arrival_reported.title: Arrival reported
client_arrival_reported.body: The customer reported their vehicle arrival.

direct_request_declined.title: Request declined
direct_request_declined.body: A direct appointment request was declined.

owner_service_record_confirmation_reques.title: Service record confirmation
owner_service_record_confirmation_reques.body: Please confirm a service record for the customer.

owner_service_record_confirmation_confir.title: Service record confirmed
owner_service_record_confirmation_confir.body: The customer confirmed the service record.

owner_service_record_confirmation_reject.title: Service record rejected
owner_service_record_confirmation_reject.body: The customer rejected the service record.

clients.emptySubtitle: Add a client or authorize a vehicle to start managing repairs.

promotions.emptySubtitle: Create your first promotion to attract clients.

invoicing.allCaughtUpSubtitle: Every completed repair already has an issued platform invoice, or none are done yet.
invoicing.heroSubtitle: Issue numbered sales invoices from completed repairs, or attach an external PDF on the repair when you use another accounting app.
invoicing.companyOverviewBody: {legalName} — {branchCount} centers linked. Invoices below are for the active center; unpaid issued total across branches: {total}.
invoicing.numberingLocked: This series is locked after the first issued invoice. Already issued numbers stay as they are. Start a new series to change prefix, width, or restart the sequence.
invoicing.numberingOpen: Set prefix, zero-pad width (1–12), and starting sequence before the first issued invoice — e.g. prefix 01, width 6 → 01000001.
invoicing.numberingNewSeriesHint: Create a new numbering series for future invoices. Old issued invoices keep their existing numbers.
invoicing.noInvoicesHint: Open a completed repair and tap “Create platform invoice”, or use the Uninvoiced repairs tab.
invoicing.noInvoicesFilterHint: Try another client name or month.
invoicing.uninvoicedHint: Completed repairs without an issued platform invoice. Tap a row to create a draft invoice.

warehouse.noPartsSubtitle: Upload a supplier invoice above or tap Add part.
warehouse.noDocumentsSubtitle: Complete a receiving draft to see it here.
warehouse.inventoryEmptySubtitle: Parts appear here after you complete a receiving document. Turn on “Show 0-qty catalog” to see parts added but never stocked.

marketComparison.title: Compare with mine
marketComparison.body: Market comparison is coming soon. You will see how your service center ranks against nearby competitors on services, ratings, and availability.

calendar.noDateYetHint: Open requests waiting for you to pick a day and time
calendar.sentToClientBody: The owner must accept or decline the new time before it is confirmed.
calendar.vehicleArrivedBody: Repair is now in service. The owner has been notified.
calendar.declineMessage: The owner will be notified that you cannot take this visit. The request will be removed from your calendar.
calendar.removeMessage: This job will leave the calendar queue. You can still find it under Repairs.

load.freeForJob: No labor booked · {duration} free for this job

notificationSettings.hint: Control push, banners, sounds, calendar reminders, and quiet hours. The inbox always keeps a record.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.emptyBody: Add your first vehicle to track service history, health, and repairs.

access.title: Vehicle history access
access.noPendingHint: When a service center asks for temporary history access, it will appear here.
access.ownerChoiceHint: Choose how much customer-visible history this center may see for this job.
access.temporaryGrantsHint: Separate from permanent Authorized service centers on the vehicle profile.
access.noTemporaryGrants: No temporary history grants right now.
access.shareBasicHint: Prior jobs in related service areas for this visit — not your full timeline.
access.shareFullHint: Broader customer-visible history for this vehicle (still no internal shop costs).

detail.currentKilometersHint: Enter your current odometer reading. It will be saved as today's reading — no date picker needed.
detail.addActivityBody: Choose what you want to add for this vehicle.
detail.noDateOrMileage: No date or mileage set yet.
detail.vinHint: Add chassis number (VIN) for better parts and service matching.
detail.registrationHintWeb: Optional. Month and year when the vehicle was first registered. Country can be updated later.
detail.registrationHintNative: Optional. Add first registration if you skipped it at create. You can change country later (e.g. if the vehicle was registered abroad).
detail.registrationHintLockedSuffix: First registration date cannot be changed after it is saved.
detail.registrationDateModalHint: Pick the month and year the vehicle was first registered.
detail.technicalEditLead: Edit engine, trailer, e-bike, and other technical fields below. Service reminders are edited from each reminder row on the vehicle screen.
detail.maintenanceSpecsHelper: These are vehicle specifications, not service reminders.
detail.mileageEvidenceHelper: Higher confidence comes from receipts, service-center records, inspections, and before/after media.
detail.obligationsManualHint: Legal obligations can be entered manually now. Automatic checks by plate/VIN can be added later where legally available.
detail.activeRepairsHint: Active repairs are kept separate from permanent service history.
detail.activeRepairsEmpty: No open or in-progress repairs on this vehicle.
detail.serviceHistoryEmpty: Completed jobs will appear here as part of your service history.
detail.serviceHistoryCollapsed_one: 1 completed record. Expand to review details.
detail.serviceHistoryCollapsed_other: {count} completed records. Expand to review details.
detail.authorizedCentersHint: Authorizing a center shares full mechanical service history, reminders, and specs. Booking a repair without authorizing only grants job access: {jobAccessHint}
detail.authorizedCentersEmpty: No service centers are authorized yet.
detail.authorizedCentersCollapsed_one: 1 authorized center. Expand to manage access.
detail.authorizedCentersCollapsed_other: {count} authorized centers. Expand to manage access.
detail.bookingJobAccessHint: Automatic when you book a repair. The center sees this job plus prior work in the same service area (e.g. brakes, oil).
detail.autoCheckLaterBody: Automatic checks are not enabled yet. You can enter the date manually.
detail.reminderUnavailableBody: This reminder is not loaded yet. Try again in a moment, or pull to refresh when available.
detail.dueKilometersValidation: Due kilometers must be a whole number or empty.
detail.identityLockedHint: Make/model and VIN are locked after creation. Plate and registration country can be changed anytime. Changing vehicle type asks for confirmation. First registration date can be added once if you skipped it at create. Kilometers are on the vehicle screen.
detail.identityEditableHint: Add VIN once, then save — make/model stay locked after creation. Plate is always editable. Registration is optional and edited below when expanded. Kilometers are on the vehicle screen.
detail.vehicleTypeHint: Car, truck, motorcycle, bicycle, trailer, etc. Workshops and service matching use this on bookings.
detail.documentsPhotosCollapsed: {count} file on record. Expand to browse.
detail.documentsPhotosCollapsed_plural: {count} files on record. Expand to browse.
detail.documentArchiveShopHint: Document archive is visible to the vehicle owner.
detail.kilometersWholeNumber: Kilometers must be a whole number.
detail.advanceNoticeDaysValidation: Advance notice days must be a whole number or empty.
detail.advanceNoticeKmValidation: Advance notice kilometers must be a whole number or empty.
detail.noCompletedServiceBody: Completed jobs will appear in service history.
detail.noRepairsBody: There are no repair records on this vehicle yet.

logServiceRecord.title: Service Record
logServiceRecord.subtitle: Use this for completed maintenance or repair work.
logServiceRecord.completedDateHint: Shown as DD.MM.YYYY. You can pick today or any past date.
logServiceRecord.kilometersHelper: Old records are allowed — including lower mileage (dashboard replacement, correction, or historical entry). Vehicle current km only increases when this value is higher. Possible rollback warnings lower confidence only; they never block save.
logServiceRecord.inspectionReminderHint: This updates your technical inspection reminder. Use Obligation if you only need to set a due date without logging workshop work.
logServiceRecord.oilDefaultsHint: Defaults to +{interval} km and +1 year from the service date. Edit either field to override.
logServiceRecord.brakeNextCheckPlaceholder: Overrides default recommendation after save if set
logServiceRecord.costsHint: Amounts use major units (EUR). Total updates when labor or parts change; you can still edit it. If only total is filled, labor is stored as 0 and parts as the total.
logServiceRecord.providerHint: Optional. Link who performed the work, or mark it as owner-performed.
logServiceRecord.manualCenterHint: Saved in the directory and linked to this record — not authorized on your vehicle until they join the platform.
logServiceRecord.notesPlaceholderDefault: What was done, parts brands, etc.
logServiceRecord.odometerPhotoHint: Odometer photos are optional evidence — no automatic mileage reading.
logServiceRecord.attachmentsEmptyHint: Add receipts, invoices, or photos now — they upload after you save.
logServiceRecord.attachmentsAfterSaveHint: Files are linked to this service record after save. You can add more from the record detail screen later.

errors.selectCenter: Select an authorized service center or choose another provider option.
errors.noRepairId: Saved, but no repair id returned.

logServiceRecord.documentsSavedPartial: Service record saved, but some documents failed to upload.

addObligationPayment.title: Obligation
addObligationPayment.subtitle: Use this for insurance, vignette, road tax, and inspection dates/payments.
addObligationPayment.amountPlaceholder: Optional — stored in minor units on the server
addObligationPayment.documentsHint: Optional — upload policy, sticker, or payment proof. Amount and valid-until from this form are sent with the file.

errors.invalidDueDate: Choose a valid due / valid-until date.
errors.dueDateRequired: Due or valid-until date is required.
errors.invalidPaidDate: Paid date must be empty or a valid date.
errors.invalidAmount: Amount must be a valid number.

addObligationPayment.reminderUnavailableBody: This reminder is not loaded yet. Go back to the vehicle screen and try again.
addObligationPayment.expenseFailed: Expense could not be recorded — check the API or try again later.
addObligationPayment.documentFailed: Document could not be uploaded — try again from Documents & photos on the vehicle screen.

vehicleWizard.reviewLead: Check the details below, then create your vehicle.
vehicleWizard.contextClientLead: You are adding this vehicle for {name}.

partnerOnboarding.title: Set up your shop
partnerOnboarding.servicesHint: Filtered to your selected business type.
partnerOnboarding.noServices: No services for this business type.
partnerOnboarding.vehicleTypesHint: These drive which operations you can price.
partnerOnboarding.operationsHint: Filtered to your business type and vehicle types. Add prices in the full price list.
partnerOnboarding.noOperations: Select vehicle types first to see operations.
partnerOnboarding.readyToPublish: Your profile is ready to publish.
partnerOnboarding.notReady: A few things are left before you can publish.
partnerOnboarding.hoursHint: Set the days and times you are open. Customers see these on your public page.
partnerOnboarding.legalHint: Used on invoices. Kept separate from your public profile.

errors.vehicleRequired: Select at least one vehicle type.
errors.hoursRequired: Set opening hours for at least one day.
errors.taxIdRequired: Enter your VAT number or company ID.

partnerOnboarding.locationHint: Address and map pin power discovery, SEO, and incoming requests.
partnerOnboarding.mapPinHint: Drop a pin — we fill street, country, city, and phone prefix.
partnerOnboarding.pricesHint: Customers need at least one published operation price before your profile can go live.
partnerOnboarding.pricesNoOps: Select operations in the Services step first.
partnerOnboarding.pricesReady: At least one price is published
partnerOnboarding.photosHint: A logo or shop photo builds trust. You can skip and add these later.
partnerOnboarding.photosLimitBody: You can upload up to {max} photos.
partnerOnboarding.photosPermissionBody: Allow access to photos to upload.
partnerOnboarding.aboutHint: A short description helps customers choose you. Optional for publish.
partnerOnboarding.previewHint: One preview of how customers will see your service center.
partnerOnboarding.publishMissingHint: Tap a missing item to jump to its wizard step.

createVehicle.title: Add vehicle
createVehicle.manualEntryHint: Can't find your vehicle? Enter details manually.

errors.modelNotRecognizedBody: We could not match that model name. Check the spelling or tap a suggestion below the model field.
errors.chooseCatalogOrManual: Choose a catalog brand and model, or enter your model manually.
errors.kilometersWholeNumber: Kilometers must be a whole number.

location.title: Location
location.permissionBody: Allow location access to detect your country.
location.countryError: Could not determine your country from location.

vehicleSpecSuggestion.title: Maintenance specifications
vehicleSpecSuggestion.emptyBody: We don't have verified specifications for this exact model yet. You can add them later under optional details.
vehicleSpecSuggestion.recommendedTitle: Recommended maintenance specs for this vehicle
vehicleSpecSuggestion.disclaimer: Specifications are suggestions. Always verify with the service center or manufacturer data before service.
vehicleSpecSuggestion.applied: Specs applied — you can edit them in optional details.

manageServiceCenters.title: Service center access
manageServiceCenters.subtitle: Choose who can see more than a single booked job. Booking a repair always grants job-only access for that repair; authorizing a center below shares full mechanical history.
manageServiceCenters.contextBanner: Use Find & authorize to discover shops on the map. Your vehicle stays in context so you can authorize with one tap from a pin or shop profile.

serviceRecordCenter.title: Service center
serviceRecordCenter.selfDescription: Owner-performed work — no service center linked.
serviceRecordCenter.chooseDescription: Search the map or directory for an existing center.
serviceRecordCenter.addUnlistedDescription: Drop a pin on the map or enter contact details manually.
serviceRecordCenter.subtitle: Optional. Link a service center if someone else did the work, or mark it as self-performed.

mileageConfidence.title: Mileage confidence
mileageConfidence.sheetLead: Tap any row to jump to service history, add proof, or manage access. Lower mileage on old records is always allowed.
mileageConfidence.tapRowHint: Tap a row below or the title for actions. Lower mileage on old records is allowed.

hints.low: Add service records, receipts, or optional odometer photos over time.
hints.medium: History is building — shop confirmations and documents raise confidence.
hints.high: Solid history — keep attaching proof when you have it.
hints.verified_history: Strong corroborated history for this vehicle.

mileageConfidence.defaultHelper: Confidence is built from service history, documents, and photos — never blocks saving records.

summaries.verified: Strong service history with corroborating records.
summaries.high: Good supporting history; keep adding receipts or shop-confirmed records when you can.
summaries.mediumRollback: Some history present, but mileage gaps or corrections lowered confidence.
summaries.mediumWorkshop: {count} service record(s) on file including workshop names; shop-confirmed records and receipts would raise trust further.
summaries.mediumPartial: Partial history; add receipts, shop-confirmed records, or optional odometer photos.
summaries.lowRollback: Limited evidence and mileage corrections were noted — history is still saved.
summaries.lowWithRecords: {count} service record(s) on file; attach receipts or optional odometer photos to improve confidence.
summaries.lowEmpty: Log completed services and attach proof over time — nothing blocks saving corrections.

chronological_service_history.negative: Service history order or mileage progression looks uneven
chronological_service_history.missing: Add more dated service records for a clearer timeline

workshop_attributed_records.missing: No workshop named on service records yet

service_center_confirmed_records.neutral: Workshop named on record — not shop-confirmed on platform yet
service_center_confirmed_records.missing: No shop-confirmed records yet (booked or shop-entered jobs)

odometer_photos_attached.missing: No odometer photos yet (optional — helps verify mileage)

technical_inspection_records.neutral: Inspection reminder is set, but no inspection evidence record is attached yet

authorized_service_centers.neutral: {count} authorized service center (can view history — separate from mileage proof)
authorized_service_centers.neutral_plural: {count} authorized service centers (can view history — separate from mileage proof)

warnings.mileage_lower_than_prior: Lower mileage entered after a higher recorded mileage
warnings.dashboard_replacement_hint: Dashboard replacement or correction may have occurred

subtitle.maintenance_recommended: Add service history or reminders to improve insights.
subtitle.needs_attention: There are active items that may need review.
subtitle.at_service_center: Your vehicle is currently being serviced.

reasons.active_repairs: Vehicle currently has active repair requests.

repairs.title: Repairs
repairs.serviceHistoryEmptyBody: Completed repairs and logged service records will appear here.

historyAccess.cardHint: Ask the owner to approve temporary access to customer-visible service history for this job.
historyAccess.defaultReason: Need prior service history for this repair
historyAccess.alreadySent: A history access request was already sent for this repair. Ask the owner to approve it, or show the existing QR/code if still valid.
historyAccess.shopIneligible: This service center is not eligible to request history yet (claimed but not verified). On local/dev, restart Daphne after enabling DEBUG or VEHICLE_HISTORY_ACCESS_ALLOW_CLAIMED_UNVERIFIED.
historyAccess.missingVehicle: Vehicle is required for history access

detail.visitNotStarted: Your visit has not started yet. Check in when you arrive at the service center.
detail.checkedInWaiting: You checked in. The service center will confirm when your vehicle is on site.
detail.cancelAppointmentOwnerBody: The service center will be notified. You can request a new time later.
detail.cancelAppointmentShopBody: The owner will be notified. The visit will be removed from your calendar.
detail.checkedInBody: The service center has been notified. They will confirm when your vehicle is on site.
detail.compareAndBook: Compare and book a proposal below.
detail.readyForPickupBody: {shopName} has finished your service. You can collect {vehicle} when convenient.
detail.readyForPickupAfterShop: has finished your service. You can collect {vehicle} when convenient.
detail.completedRecordHelper: This repair is now part of the vehicle service history.
detail.ownerLoggedRecordHelper: You logged this service. It is saved as part of your vehicle history.
detail.noPartsRecorded: No parts recorded for this service.
detail.noAmountsRecorded: No amounts recorded on this repair.
detail.photosPermanentRecord: Part of the permanent service record as visual proof and history evidence.
detail.photosOwnerLoggedDone: Add photos or receipts from this screen to strengthen this logged record (when uploads are enabled).
detail.noPhotosOrVideos: No photos or videos added yet.

requestService.problemPlaceholder: e.g. oil change, brake noise, AC not cooling, warning light...
requestService.inferredMatched: Based on your description, this looks like "{name}".
requestService.inferredDefault: If you don't pick a type, we'll send this as "{name}".
requestService.photosHelp: Photos help the service center understand the issue faster.
requestService.noMediaSubtitle: Optional — you can send your request without photos or video.
requestService.preferredVisitHint: Preferred visit — the service center must confirm before it is booked.
requestService.routingHint: Choose how your request is routed to service centers.
requestService.routingDefaultsHint: Defaults route your request to nearby qualified service centers.
requestService.noMatchingCenters: No matching service centers available for current vehicle/service filters.
requestService.guaranteeHelper: Only service centers offering guarantee will receive this request.
requestService.kilometersHint: Optional current-km hint for this request.
requestService.kilometersCurrentOdometer: Current odometer if you know it
requestService.permissionMedia: Allow access to photos/videos to attach media.
requestService.describeOrPickType: Describe the problem or pick a service type so the service center can understand your request.
requestService.selectCenterOrMode: Select at least one service center or choose another targeting mode.
requestService.classifyAs: We'll classify this as "{name}" based on your description.
requestService.noTypeSelected: No service type selected — we'll send this as "{name}" so the service center can review it.
requestService.onlyOpenEditable: Only open requests can be edited.
requestService.requestUpdatedMediaFailed: Request updated, but some media failed to upload.
requestService.repairCreatedMediaFailed: Repair was created, but some media failed to upload.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.liveHint: Live messages from your current Veversal account.
notifications.intro: Your vehicle alerts, offers, bookings and documents — organized in one place.
notifications.emptyEmbedded: No recent activity in your live feed yet.
notifications.emptySubtitle: Offers, promotions, bookings, and reschedule updates appear here.
notifications.noLinkedDetail: No linked detail for this notification.

oilChange.title: Oil change recommended
oilChange.description: Based on your mileage trend, schedule an oil change in the next 1,500 km.

newOffer.title: New offer from a service center
newOffer.description: A nearby center sent a quote for your open repair request.

inspection.title: Annual inspection approaching
inspection.description: Keep your roadworthiness documents up to date before expiry.

visitConfirmed.title: Visit confirmed
visitConfirmed.description: Your service center confirmed the appointment time.

invoice.title: Invoice uploaded
invoice.description: A repair document was added to your vehicle history.

hints.reschedule_proposed: Tap to accept or decline the new time
hints.repair_ready_for_pickup: Tap to view completed service details

reschedule_proposed.title: Reschedule proposed
reschedule_proposed.body: A service center proposed a new appointment time.

repair_scheduled.title: Appointment scheduled
repair_scheduled.body: Your repair visit has been scheduled.

repair_ready_for_pickup.title: Ready for pickup
repair_ready_for_pickup.body: Your vehicle is ready for pickup.

offer_received.title: New offer received
offer_received.body: A service center sent a quote for your request.

offer_status.title: Offer update
offer_status.body: There is an update on your repair offer.

repair_completed.title: Repair completed
repair_completed.body: Your repair has been marked as completed.

booking_confirmed.title: Booking confirmed
booking_confirmed.body: Your service appointment has been confirmed.

document_ready.title: Document ready
document_ready.body: A new document is available in your account.

profile.title: Profile
profile.garageSceneHelper: Choose a garage scene for your dashboard background.
profile.vehicleAccessHelper: You'll later be able to share vehicle access with family members, drivers, or fleet managers.
profile.phonePrefixHelperWithCountry: Prefix is set from your country when available — you can edit it if needed.
profile.phonePrefixHelperNoCountry: No country selected: enter your international prefix (e.g. +359) so we can store a callable number.
profile.heroSubtitle: Use any display name you prefer. Real/legal names are not required.
profile.displayNamePlaceholder: How should service centers address you?
profile.displayNameHelper: Privacy-first: choose a friendly name you are comfortable sharing.
profile.searchCityPlaceholder: Type at least 2 letters to search
profile.contactHelper: This information helps service centers contact you about repairs and service updates.
profile.phoneRequired: Enter your phone number (digits after the country prefix).
profile.phonePrefixMissingNoCountry: Select a country to set the prefix automatically, or enter a country code (e.g. +359) in the prefix field.
profile.phonePrefixMissing: Enter a country prefix (e.g. +359). Your selected country did not provide one — fill the prefix field manually.
profile.phoneInvalid: Check the country prefix and number — the full phone could not be built.

servicePricingForm.partsHint: Typical parts cost for this service. Shown to clients as part of the total when published.
servicePricingForm.laborHint: Workshop labor price for this service. Set the price here — not the labor time below.
servicePricingForm.useRangeHint: Optional. Set a from–to window when typical labor varies (e.g. gearbox rebuild).
servicePricingForm.rangeInvalid: Labor time to must be greater than or equal to labor time from.

partnerProfile.title: Profile
partnerProfile.profileReadyBody: Clients can find you on the map and open repair requests.
partnerProfile.profileReadyAddMore: Add photos and services to strengthen your page.
partnerProfile.profileEncourage: Continue guided setup so customers can find and trust your service center.
partnerProfile.continueSetupBody: Guided setup owns location, services, prices, hours, photos, and publish.
partnerProfile.editViaWizard: Edit profile details in guided setup
partnerProfile.publicPreviewReady: How clients see your shop on the map and in search.
partnerProfile.publicPreviewDraft: Live preview — finish required fields to go live.
partnerProfile.previewHowClientsSee: How clients will see your shop
partnerProfile.viewPublicProfileUnavailable: Public profile link is not available yet. Save your business name and location, then try again.
partnerProfile.publicUrlIncomplete: This URL is temporary. Save your public business name (and city) to get a permanent SEO-friendly link.
partnerProfile.descriptionHelper: This description will appear on your public Veversal page and is automatically translated for international customers.
partnerProfile.businessTypeHelper: Choose the one primary type that best describes this location. It sets your map pin and main category page.
partnerProfile.businessTypeLoading: Business types are loading from backend taxonomy.
partnerProfile.mapPinPreview: This is the pin shown on the discovery map.
partnerProfile.secondaryBusinessTypesHelper: Optional. Add other categories this location also covers. Your map pin still follows the primary type.
partnerProfile.noBusinessTypesMatch: No business types match your search.
partnerProfile.servicesOfferedHelper: Pick the specific services you provide. Only services matching your selected business types are shown.
partnerProfile.selectBusinessTypeFirst: Select a primary business type to enable services.
partnerProfile.operationsHelper: Select operations you offer. When you pick one, add typical labor time and a labor price range — this powers search, filters, and discovery.
partnerProfile.operationsExamples: Examples: Oil Change 45 min · labor 40€–70€; Gearbox 6–10 h · labor 800€–1500€.
partnerProfile.operationsMissingPrices: {count} selected operation(s) still need a labor price.
partnerProfile.operationsLoading: Services are loading from backend taxonomy.
partnerProfile.operationsPricingHint: Typical labor time and labor price range shown to customers. This is billable labor, not when the vehicle will be ready.
partnerProfile.operationsPartsHint: Parts and consumables (e.g. tires) are not fixed on the public menu — they are quoted when the client requests an offer. For tire work, clients will be asked for tire size at booking.
partnerProfile.useDurationRangeHint: Optional. Set a from–to window when typical labor varies (e.g. gearbox rebuild).
partnerProfile.durationRangeInvalid: Labor time to must be greater than or equal to labor time from.
partnerProfile.durationRequired: Enter a labor time greater than 0 minutes.
partnerProfile.photosEmptyHint: Add at least 3 photos of your workspace. First photo is the cover.
partnerProfile.photosReorderHint: First photo is the cover. Drag (web) or use arrows to reorder. Cover choice is preview-only until photo order is saved on the server.
partnerProfile.noPhotosSubtitle: Add photos to build trust and improve profile quality.
partnerProfile.onlinePresenceHelper: Connect channels customers already use. Google Business Profile unlocks reviews and local discovery.
partnerProfile.savedSetupPartial: Profile saved. Please finish the required fields to start serving jobs.

serviceCenters.geoPermissionDenied: Location permission is required to use this feature.
serviceCenters.locationHintNear: Distances shown from your current location.
serviceCenters.locationHintTap: Tap Locate me to sort and show distances.
serviceCenters.authorizeBanner: Authorizing for {vehicle}. Open a shop profile to choose vehicles and authorize access.
serviceCenters.emptyTitle: No service centers match these filters.

profile.authorizeHint: Share full mechanical history with this service center for the vehicles you choose below.
profile.chooseForVehicle: Choose which vehicles to authorize for {vehicle}.
profile.unclaimedBody: This service center was added from a customer service record. The business can claim this profile later to manage bookings and confirm records.
profile.noPhotosSubtitle: This service center has not uploaded photos.
profile.partsQuotedSeparately: Parts and consumables are quoted separately when you request an offer.
profile.partsIncludedNote: Prices show typical parts and labor. Final parts depend on your vehicle and are confirmed in your offer.
profile.authorizeExplainer: Authorization shares full mechanical service history for the vehicles you select. Booking a repair without authorizing only grants access to that job and related prior work in the same category.
profile.loadErrorNetwork: The Veversal service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
profile.loadErrorInvalid: This service center link is invalid or outdated.
profile.loadErrorGeneric: Check your connection and try again.
profile.addVehicleFirstBody: You need at least one vehicle before requesting a repair.

quickRequest.subtitle: Pick a service and preferred visit. The shop can accept or decline — wait for their confirmation before you drive over.
quickRequest.notice: Your preferred time is not booked until the center confirms.
quickRequest.notesPlaceholderTire: Tire size (e.g. 225/45 R17), season, and any other details.
quickRequest.noServicesListed: This shop has not listed specific services yet.
quickRequest.signInSubtitle: Sign in to ask {shopName} for a quote and preferred visit time.
quickRequest.signInRequiredBody: Please sign in to send a service request.
quickRequest.addVehicleBody: Register a vehicle before requesting service.
quickRequest.chooseVehicleBody: Select which vehicle this request is for.
quickRequest.requestSentBody: The shop will review your request and confirm date and time before you should bring your vehicle.

serviceMenu.vehiclePricingHint: Set a price per vehicle type you service. "All vehicles" is the fallback used when a type has no specific price.
serviceMenu.noSupportedVehicles: Add supported vehicle types in your profile to set per-vehicle prices.
serviceMenu.intro: All your services are listed here. Toggle Published to show prices on your public profile — expand a row to set parts, labor, and per-vehicle prices.
serviceMenu.noMatchingTypes: No matching types — try another search.
serviceMenu.allTypesAlreadyAdded: All common service types are already on your price list.
serviceMenu.emptyTitle: No services on your price list yet
serviceMenu.emptyBody: Tap Add service to pick oil change, brakes, diagnostics, and more — or learn price ranges automatically from completed jobs.
serviceMenu.saveFailed: Failed to save price list item
serviceMenu.visibilityFailed: Could not update price list visibility

access.capabilityDisabledBody: This module is not enabled for your service center. Ask the owner to turn it on in center settings.
access.permissionDeniedBody: Your role does not have permission to open this screen.

common.noLinesExtracted: No line items were extracted. You can still confirm the total.

documentImports.title: Document imports
documentImports.empty: No imports yet. Upload a PDF or image to start.

review.title: Rate this service
review.recommend: Would you recommend this service center?
review.alreadySubmitted: You already submitted a review for this service.
review.onlyWhenDone: Reviews are available after the service is completed.

clientComplaint.title: Report an issue
clientComplaint.subject: Subject
clientComplaint.alreadyFiled: You already filed a complaint for this service.
clientComplaint.onlyWhenDone: Complaints are available after the service is completed.

serviceCentersMeta.title: {app} Service Centers
serviceCentersMeta.description: Discover service centers, compare services, and find trusted vehicle care on Veversal.

root.title: {app} Service Centers
root.description: Discover service centers, compare services, and find trusted vehicle care on Veversal.

vehicleCityRepair.title: {vehicle} {repair} in {city} | {app}
vehicleCityRepair.description: Find service centers for {vehicle} {repair} in {city} on {app}.

repairCity.title: {repair} in {city} | {app}
repairCity.description: Find service centers for {repair} in {city} on {app}.

city.title: Service centers in {city} | {app}
city.description: Find service centers in {city} for repairs, maintenance, and trusted vehicle care on {app}.

brand.title: {brand} service centers | {app}
brand.description: Find service centers specializing in {brand} vehicles on {app}.

brandCityRepair.title: {brand} {repair} in {city} | {app}
brandCityRepair.description: Find {brand} service centers for {repair} in {city} on {app}.

serviceCenterProfile.title: {name} | {app}
serviceCenterProfile.description: {name} service center profile in {city} on Veversal.

subscription.planTaglineNone: You don't have an active plan yet. Your profile stays visible, but you won't receive new requests until you choose a plan below.
subscription.planTaglineTrial: You're exploring Veversal. Upgrade to keep accepting jobs when your trial ends.
subscription.planTaglinePro: Everything you need to run your workshop.
subscription.planTaglinePremium: Grow your workshop with more visibility.
subscription.planTaglineEnterprise: A tailored setup for larger operations.
subscription.inactiveHelp: Your profile stays visible to customers, but you won't receive new repair requests until you upgrade.
subscription.notAcceptingRequests: Your subscription is inactive, so you're not receiving new requests right now.
subscription.upgradeSubtitle: Pick the plan that fits your workshop. PRO gives you everything you need to run day to day; Premium helps you grow with more visibility.
subscription.proTagline: Everything you need to run your workshop.
subscription.enterpriseTagline: For chains, dealer groups and custom integrations.
subscription.enterpriseEmailBody:
Hello Veversal team,

We'd like to talk about an Enterprise setup for our business.

Business: {{shop}}

Thank you.
subscription.bankStep1: Choose your plan and request the payment details.
subscription.bankStep2: Transfer the exact amount using the payment reference shown.
subscription.bankStep3: We confirm your transfer and activate your plan.
subscription.bankAccountingNote: Official accounting documents are issued after we confirm your transfer.
subscription.premiumNoteBody: Featured profile, higher marketplace ranking, premium badge, and homepage promo — same ERP tools as PRO. Marketing placements are sold separately.
subscription.upgradeCtaSub: No payment in-app — we will activate your plan manually
subscription.noPaymentYet: Self-serve checkout is coming later. For now, contact Veversal or ask an admin to assign PRO / Premium.
subscription.lockedTeaserBody: See and respond to customer requests with a PRO plan.
subscription.gateLockedTitle: This is part of your PRO plan
subscription.gateLockedBody: Upgrade to PRO to manage repairs, inventory and invoicing in one place. Your existing data stays safe.
subscription.cardCheckoutIntro: Pay securely with Stripe Checkout. Veversal never stores your card details. Your plan activates once payment is confirmed — not the moment you return from checkout.
subscription.stripeConfigMissingBody: Stripe Checkout is not available yet. Use bank transfer or contact Veversal partners support.
subscription.checkoutUrlMissing: Checkout URL was not returned. Try again or use bank transfer.
subscription.bankTransferIntro: Prefer a bank transfer? You'll get our bank details and a unique payment reference. Your subscription activates once Veversal confirms the transfer.
subscription.bankConfigMissingBody: Payment instructions are not available yet. Contact Veversal partners support.
subscription.activatedAfterConfirm: Your subscription will be activated after the payment is confirmed.
subscription.notAnInvoice: This is a payment instruction, not an accounting invoice.
subscription.successBody: Card checkout completed on Stripe. Your Veversal subscription activates when payment is confirmed (usually within a few seconds). This page refreshes automatically.
